hero.name: Sanghyeon Shin
hero.title: Aspiring PM/PO
hero.subtitle: Dreaming of becoming a PM/PO who solves user problems through planning, design, and development

about.heading: About
about.description_1: Hello, I'm Sanghyeon Shin. I adapt to the changing pace of the world by developing my skills across planning, design, and development.
about.description_2: At HUFS, I double-major in Global Business & Technology and Software & AI (AI Fusion). I maintain an overall GPA of 4.14/4.5 (Major 4.25, Double major 4.1).
about.description_3: I’m comfortable with MS Office for reports, proposals, presentations, and automation. I also build insights through data analysis with Python, SQL, and Excel. On the frontend, I create user-centered interfaces with Figma, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js, and I run documentation and collaboration with Notion, Slack, and GitHub.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaboration, projects, or opportunities.
